name: BEASLEY BROADCAST GROUP INC
business: Beasley Broadcast Group operates radio stations in multiple U.S. markets and offers integrated marketing solutions across audio, digital and event platforms to advertisers. Its primary revenue source is the sale of advertising time to local, regional and national advertisers and national network advertisers.
namedSuppliers: American Society of Composers, Authors and Publishers (ASCAP)

exposures.sentence: We have developed and implemented a cybersecurity risk management program intended to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of our critical systems and information.
Digital revenue increased $2.7 million during the year ended December 31, 2025 as compared to the year ended December 31, 2024, primarily due to continued growth in the digital segment.

proposals regarding the use or restrictions on use of artificial intelligence ("AI"), including the requirement for radio broadcasters to disclose on-air and in their public files when a political advertisement contains AI-generated content.

catalysts.event: Settlement of refinancing transactions (Exchange Offer and Tender Offer) for Existing Notes
catalysts.sentence: Assuming the requisite conditions for consummation of the Refinancing Transactions are satisfied, the Company expects the Refinancing Transactions to settle on or around April 20, 2026.
